headlines.title: EMPRESS OF IRELAND DEATH LIST 934
headlines.subtitle: STEAMER SINKS WITHIN FIFTEEN MINUTES AFTER COLLISION WITH COLLIER
headlines.fullText:
RIMOUSKI, Quebec, May 29-Sinking in ninety feet of water within fifteen minutes after being rammed amidships in the upper reaches of the St. Lawrence river early today the Canadian Pacific liner Empress of Ireland carried down with her more than goo of her passengers and crew. Of the 1.367 persons on board the liner only 433 are known to have been saved, making the probable death list 934.
Looming up through the river mists, as the Empress of Ireland was lying to, waiting for the fog to lift or day to break, the Danisn collier Storstad crashed bow-on into the side of the big Canadian liner, striking her about midway of her length and ripping her side opep clear to the stern

headlines.title: CARRANZA PROTESTS ACTION OF MEDIATORS
headlines.subtitle: SPECIAL ENVOY OF REBEL CHIEF RECEIVED BY A.B. C. DIPLOMATS, BEARING MESSAGE SAYING THE REBELS WERE IGNORED.
headlines.fullText:
WASHINGTON, May 20- Mexican mediation was discussed at the cabinet meeting today and the administration took a positive position that the communication forwarded to the mediators at Niagara Falls by General Carranza, chief of the constitutionalist forces, should be received.
President Wilson announced to the cabinet that General Carranza had dispatched a note to the mediation conference seeking representation, Details of the Carranza message were not discussed but it later was declared the administration took the view that the constitutionalist chief

headlines.title: Home Rule Means Trouble in Ulster; Sailors Signaling Fleet
headlines.fullText: BELPART, May 29-The feeling which has been around here by the passing by the house of commons of the Irish home rule bill in akin to a flame ready to burst into a conflagration which may rage Indefinitely. Predictions range from the minimum of faction fighting between Oratigemen and nationallets, to the maximum of organised rebellion by the covenantora. The home government appreciating the situation, has drawn a cordon of torpedo boats in the harbor here, and conat guarde are patrolling the coast ready to signal by wig wag. to these vessels, any attempt at wan-Tunning er the Orange sympathizers.

headlines.title: Arctic Steamer Is Crushed by Ice Off Coast of Alaska
headlines.fullText:
NEW YORK, May 29. The Karluk, which carried the Stefansson expedition to the Arctic, was crushed in the ice last January, according to a message that was received here today from St. Michaels, Alaska.
The crew is marooned on Wrangel island.
